sourcesContent:
import {
  Box,
  Button,
  Flex,
  FormControl,
  FormLabel,
  Heading,
  Input,
  Text,
  Stack,
  Divider,
} from "@chakra-ui/react";
import React from "react";
import AdminNavTop from "../AdminNavTop";
import { useSelector } from "react-redux";
import { capitalizeFirstLetter } from "../../Redux/UserReducer/action";

const Setting = () => {
  const userStore = useSelector((store) => store.UserReducer);
  const name = capitalizeFirstLetter(userStore.name);

  return (
    <Box bg="#f7f9fa" minH="100vh">
      <AdminNavTop />

      <Box maxW="900px" mx="auto" mt={8} p={4}>
        <Heading size="lg" mb={6}>
          Settings
        </Heading>

        {/* Profile Section */}
        <Box
          bg="white"
          p={6}
          borderRadius="lg"
          boxShadow="sm"
          mb={6}
        >
          <Heading size="md" mb={2}>
            Profile Information
          </Heading>
          <Text fontSize="sm" color="#6a6f73" mb={4}>
            Update your account details
          </Text>

          <Stack spacing={4}>
            <FormControl>
              <FormLabel>Name</FormLabel>
              <Input
                value={name}
                border="1px solid #d1d7dc"
                _focus={{
                  borderColor: "#A435F0",
                  boxShadow: "0 0 0 1px #A435F0",
                }}
              />
            </FormControl>

            <Button
              alignSelf="flex-start"
              bg="#A435F0"
              color="white"
              _hover={{ bg: "#8710d8" }}
            >
              Save Changes
            </Button>
          </Stack>
        </Box>

        {/* Password Section */}
        <Box
          bg="white"
          p={6}
          borderRadius="lg"
          boxShadow="sm"
        >
          <Heading size="md" mb={2}>
            Update Password
          </Heading>
          <Text fontSize="sm" color="#6a6f73" mb={4}>
            Use a strong password to keep your account secure
          </Text>

          <Stack spacing={4}>
            <FormControl>
              <FormLabel>Current Password</FormLabel>
              <Input
                type="password"
                border="1px solid #d1d7dc"
                _focus={{
                  borderColor: "#A435F0",
                  boxShadow: "0 0 0 1px #A435F0",
                }}
              />
            </FormControl>

            <FormControl>
              <FormLabel>New Password</FormLabel>
              <Input
                type="password"
                border="1px solid #d1d7dc"
                _focus={{
                  borderColor: "#A435F0",
                  boxShadow: "0 0 0 1px #A435F0",
                }}
              />
            </FormControl>

            <FormControl>
              <FormLabel>Confirm Password</FormLabel>
              <Input
                type="password"
                border="1px solid #d1d7dc"
                _focus={{
                  borderColor: "#A435F0",
                  boxShadow: "0 0 0 1px #A435F0",
                }}
              />
            </FormControl>

            <Button
              alignSelf="flex-start"
              bg="#A435F0"
              color="white"
              _hover={{ bg: "#8710d8" }}
            >
              Update Password
            </Button>
          </Stack>
        </Box>
      </Box>
    </Box>
  );
};

export default Setting;
